title: How medical creator Nick Norwitz grew his Substack paid subscribers from 900 to 5,200 within 8 months
description: Creator Playbook: Unpacking the strategy behind medical YouTuber Nick Norwitz turning to Substack to significantly grow his brand.
summary_ko: 의료 크리에이터 Nick Norwitz는 8개월 만에 Substack 유료 구독자를 900명에서 5,200명으로 증가시켰습니다. 의료 분야 YouTube 크리에이터가 Substack 플랫폼을 활용하여 브랜드를 크게 성장시킨 전략을 분석합니다. 크리에이터가 구독 기반 모델로 수익화하는 방법론을 제시합니다.
summary_en: Medical creator Nick Norwitz grew his Substack paid subscribers from 900 to 5,200 within 8 months. The strategy behind how a medical YouTuber turned to Substack to significantly grow his brand is analyzed. This demonstrates how creators can monetize through subscription-based models.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 전문가 크리에이터와의 협업을 통해 구독 기반 콘텐츠 마케팅으로 충성 고객을 확보할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage expert creator partnerships to build loyal customer bases through subscription-based content marketing strategies.
key_points: Medical creator achieved 478% growth in paid subscribers within 8 months
Substack platform used as primary growth channel for brand building
Subscription-based monetization model proves effective for creators

title: Furniture.com was built for SEO. Now it’s trying to crack AI search
description: Furniture.com is among many dot-com companies grappling with how AI and chatbots are changing the way shoppers search for information.
summary_ko: Furniture.com은 기존 SEO 기반으로 구축된 비즈니스 모델에서 AI 검색 환경에 적응하려고 노력하고 있습니다. AI와 챗봇이 소비자의 정보 검색 방식을 변화시키면서 기존 닷컴 기업들이 새로운 도전에 직면하고 있습니다. 전통적인 검색 최적화에서 AI 기반 검색으로의 전환이 필요한 상황입니다.
summary_en: Furniture.com, originally built for SEO, is now trying to adapt to AI search environments. AI and chatbots are changing how shoppers search for information, presenting challenges for traditional dot-com companies. The shift from traditional search optimization to AI-based search is becoming necessary.
so_what_ko: D2C 가구 브랜드들은 AI 검색 최적화 전략을 개발하여 변화하는 소비자 검색 행동에 대응해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C furniture brands must develop AI search optimization strategies to respond to changing consumer search behaviors.
key_points: Traditional SEO-based businesses adapting to AI search technology
Consumer search behavior shifting toward AI and chatbot interfaces
Need for new optimization strategies beyond traditional SEO

title: Media Briefing: In the AI era, subscribers are the real prize — and the Telegraph proves it
description: In an era where AI is eroding referral traffic and third-party distribution, a subscriber who pays directly has become the most valuable reader a publisher can own. Springer just bought over a million of them.
summary_ko: AI 시대에 직접 결제하는 구독자가 가장 가치 있는 독자가 되었으며, Telegraph가 이를 증명하고 있습니다. AI가 추천 트래픽을 침식하고 제3자 유통을 약화시키는 상황에서 구독자 확보가 핵심이 되었습니다. Springer이 100만 명 이상의 구독자를 인수한 것이 이런 변화를 보여줍니다.
summary_en: In the AI era, subscribers who pay directly have become the most valuable readers, as demonstrated by the Telegraph. AI is eroding referral traffic and third-party distribution, making subscriber acquisition crucial. Springer's acquisition of over a million subscribers exemplifies this shift.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 AI로 인한 트래픽 변화에 대비하여 직접 구독 모델과 1st party 데이터 수집에 집중해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should focus on direct subscription models and first-party data collection to prepare for AI-driven traffic changes.
key_points: Direct-paying subscribers becoming most valuable audience in AI era
AI eroding traditional referral traffic and third-party distribution
Major acquisitions focusing on subscriber base value

title: Inside Amazon’s effort to shape the AI narrative on sustainability and ethics
description: As AI backlash grows, Amazon is trying to reshape the narrative — starting with journalists, creators and marketers.
summary_ko: Amazon이 AI에 대한 지속가능성과 윤리 관련 내러티브를 형성하려는 노력을 펼치고 있습니다. AI에 대한 반발이 증가하는 상황에서 Amazon은 내러티브를 재구성하려고 시도하고 있습니다. 저널리스트, 크리에이터, 마케터들을 대상으로 한 커뮤니케이션 전략을 시작하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Amazon is making efforts to shape the AI narrative around sustainability and ethics. As AI backlash grows, Amazon is trying to reshape the narrative landscape. The strategy begins with targeting journalists, creators, and marketers.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 AI 기술 도입 시 지속가능성과 윤리적 측면을 강조하는 커뮤니케이션 전략이 필요합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands need communication strategies emphasizing sustainability and ethics when implementing AI technologies.
key_points: Amazon actively shaping AI sustainability and ethics narrative
Growing AI backlash requiring proactive narrative management
Targeting key stakeholders including journalists and marketers

title: Today's NYT Mini Crossword Answers for Thursday, March 12
description: Here are the answers for The New York Times Mini Crossword for March 12.
summary_ko: 3월 12일 목요일 뉴욕타임스 미니 크로스워드 퍼즐의 정답을 제공합니다. 원문에서 확인되지 않음. 원문에서 확인되지 않음.
summary_en: Provides answers for The New York Times Mini Crossword for Thursday, March 12. Content details not confirmed in source. Limited business relevance identified.
so_what_ko: D2C 비즈니스와 직접적 연관성이 낮은 콘텐츠입니다.
so_what_en: Limited direct relevance to D2C business operations.
key_points: NYT Mini Crossword answers for March 12
Gaming/puzzle content

title: Today's NYT Connections: Sports Edition Hints and Answers for March 12, #535
description: Here are hints and the answers for the NYT Connections: Sports Edition puzzle for March 12, No. 535.
summary_ko: 뉴욕타임스 커넥션즈 스포츠 에디션 3월 12일 퍼즐 #535에 대한 힌트와 정답을 제공합니다. CNET에서 게임 카테고리로 분류된 콘텐츠입니다. 독자들이 퍼즐 게임을 해결할 수 있도록 도움을 제공하는 가이드 형식의 기사입니다.
summary_en: CNET provides hints and answers for the New York Times Connections Sports Edition puzzle for March 12, No. 535. This is gaming category content designed to help readers solve puzzle games. The article serves as a guide format to assist users with puzzle-solving strategies.
so_what_ko: 게임화된 콘텐츠와 퍼즐 기반 마케팅이 소비자 참여도를 높이는 트렌드로, D2C 브랜드의 고객 참여 전략에 활용 가능합니다.
so_what_en: Gamified content and puzzle-based marketing represent growing engagement trends that D2C brands can leverage for customer interaction strategies.
key_points: NYT Connections puzzle game guidance content
Gaming category classification by CNET
Consumer engagement through puzzle solving

title: Social Media and AI Want Your Attention at All Times. This New Documentary Says That's Bad
description: Your Attention Please, a documentary premiering this week at SXSW in Austin, Texas, explores how we live in the attention economy.
summary_ko: SXSW에서 상영되는 다큐멘터리 'Your Attention Please'는 소셜미디어와 AI가 지속적으로 사용자의 주의를 끌려 하는 현상을 탐구합니다. 이 작품은 현대 사회의 관심 경제(attention economy) 속에서 우리가 어떻게 살아가고 있는지를 분석합니다. 오스틴에서 열리는 SXSW 페스티벌에서 이번 주 초연될 예정입니다.
summary_en: The documentary 'Your Attention Please' premiering at SXSW explores how social media and AI constantly compete for user attention. The film analyzes how we live within the modern attention economy. It will debut this week at the South by Southwest festival in Austin, Texas.
so_what_ko: 관심 경제에 대한 인식 변화로 D2C 브랜드는 고객의 주의를 끄는 방식을 재고하고, 더 의미 있고 윤리적인 참여 전략을 개발해야 합니다.
so_what_en: Growing awareness of the attention economy requires D2C brands to reconsider attention-grabbing tactics and develop more meaningful, ethical customer engagement strategies.
key_points: Documentary critiques social media and AI attention competition
Explores the attention economy concept
Premiered at SXSW festival in Austin

title: SXSW 2026 Updates: What We Expect on Tech and Culture From Austin
description: Innovation. Music. Films. Artificial intelligence. Here's what we're looking forward to at this year's South by Southwest festival and conference.
summary_ko: SXSW 2026에서는 혁신, 음악, 영화, 인공지능 등 다양한 분야의 기술과 문화 트렌드가 소개될 예정입니다. 오스틴에서 개최되는 이번 사우스 바이 사우스웨스트 페스티벌은 기술 혁신과 문화의 융합을 보여줄 것으로 기대됩니다. CNET에서 올해 행사에서 주목할 만한 포인트들을 정리하여 소개하고 있습니다.
summary_en: SXSW 2026 will showcase technology and cultural trends across innovation, music, films, and artificial intelligence. The South by Southwest festival in Austin is expected to demonstrate the convergence of technological innovation and culture. CNET highlights the key points to watch for at this year's event.
so_what_ko: SXSW와 같은 융합형 이벤트는 D2C 브랜드가 기술과 문화를 결합한 혁신적 마케팅 전략을 발견하고 적용할 수 있는 기회를 제공합니다.
so_what_en: Convergence events like SXSW offer D2C brands opportunities to discover and apply innovative marketing strategies that blend technology and culture.
key_points: SXSW 2026 features innovation, music, films, and AI
Technology and culture convergence showcase
Austin-based festival highlighting trends

title: Meta Launches AI Tools to Identify and Flag Messages From Scammers
description: The company aims to combat growing fraud schemes, including impersonation accounts that lure users with fake celebrity endorsements.
summary_ko: 메타가 사기꾼들의 메시지를 식별하고 신고하는 새로운 AI 도구를 출시했습니다. 이 도구는 가짜 유명인 추천을 이용해 사용자를 유혹하는 가짜 계정을 포함한 증가하는 사기 행각에 대응하기 위해 개발되었습니다. 회사는 사용자들을 사기로부터 보호하기 위한 노력을 강화하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Meta has launched new AI tools to identify and flag scammer messages. The tools are designed to combat growing fraud schemes, including impersonation accounts that lure users with fake celebrity endorsements. The company is strengthening efforts to protect users from fraudulent activities.
so_what_ko: AI 기반 사기 탐지 기술의 발전으로 D2C 브랜드는 고객 신뢰도 향상과 안전한 거래 환경 구축을 위해 유사한 보안 솔루션 도입을 검토해야 합니다.
so_what_en: Advances in AI-powered fraud detection require D2C brands to consider implementing similar security solutions to enhance customer trust and create safer transaction environments.
key_points: Meta launches AI tools for scammer detection
Targets fake celebrity endorsement schemes
Aims to combat growing fraud activities

title: New Ecommerce Tools: March 11, 2026
description:
This week's rundown includes product feeds, localized commerce, installment payments, risk intelligence, social commerce, agentic commerce, parcel lockers, and more.
The post New Ecommerce Tools: March 11, 2026 appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.
summary_ko: 3월 11일자 새로운 이커머스 도구 모음에는 상품 피드, 현지화 커머스, 할부 결제, 위험 인텔리전스 등이 포함되어 있습니다. 소셜 커머스, 에이전틱 커머스, 택배함 등 다양한 영역의 최신 도구들이 소개되었습니다. Practical Ecommerce에서 주간 단위로 정리하여 제공하는 업계 동향 정보입니다.
summary_en: The March 11 roundup of new ecommerce tools includes product feeds, localized commerce, installment payments, and risk intelligence solutions. Various tools covering social commerce, agentic commerce, and parcel lockers were featured. This weekly compilation is provided by Practical Ecommerce as industry trend information.
so_what_ko: 에이전틱 커머스와 현지화 커머스 등 새로운 기술 트렌드를 활용하여 D2C 브랜드는 개인화된 쇼핑 경험과 글로벌 확장 전략을 강화할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage emerging trends like agentic commerce and localized commerce to strengthen personalized shopping experiences and global expansion strategies.
key_points: Weekly ecommerce tools compilation
Includes agentic commerce and social commerce solutions
Features localized commerce and payment innovations

title: Rebecca Minkoff footwear comes to QVC
description: Additionally, the fashion designer’s RM Studio x Rebecca Minkoff spring ready-to-wear collection is available exclusively at QVC.
summary_ko: 패션 브랜드 Rebecca Minkoff가 QVC를 통해 신발 컬렉션을 출시했습니다. RM Studio x Rebecca Minkoff 봄 기성복 컬렉션이 QVC에서 독점 판매됩니다. 패션 디자이너 브랜드의 홈쇼핑 채널 진출 사례입니다.
summary_en: Fashion brand Rebecca Minkoff has launched its footwear collection through QVC. The RM Studio x Rebecca Minkoff spring ready-to-wear collection is available exclusively at QVC. This represents a fashion designer brand's expansion into home shopping channels.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들이 전통적인 홈쇼핑 채널과의 파트너십을 통해 새로운 고객층에 접근할 수 있음을 시사합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can access new customer segments through partnerships with traditional home shopping channels like QVC.
key_points: Rebecca Minkoff footwear collection launches on QVC
Exclusive spring ready-to-wear collection available on QVC
Fashion brand expanding into home shopping channel distribution

title: Target reduces prices on 3K products to draw in busy families
description: The seasonal price drops include a selection of baby products, as the retailer aims to attract a demographic it lost sight of.
summary_ko: Target이 바쁜 가족들을 유치하기 위해 3천 개 제품의 가격을 인하했습니다. 계절별 가격 인하에는 베이비 제품 선택이 포함되어 있습니다. 이는 타겟이 놓친 고객층을 되찾기 위한 전략입니다.
summary_en: Target has reduced prices on 3,000 products to attract busy families. The seasonal price drops include a selection of baby products. This strategy aims to recapture a demographic the retailer had lost sight of.
so_what_ko: 대형 리테일러들이 특정 고객층 회복을 위해 대규모 가격 인하 전략을 사용하고 있어, D2C 브랜드들도 가격 경쟁력 강화가 필요합니다.
so_what_en: Major retailers are using large-scale price reduction strategies to recapture customer segments, requiring D2C brands to strengthen price competitiveness.
key_points: Target reduces prices on 3,000 products
Focus on baby products to attract busy families
Strategy to recapture lost customer demographic

title: With $500M in fresh funding, Quince’s valuation tops $10B
description: The DTC brand, best known for its attractively priced cashmere sweaters, said revenue grows by triple digits annually and topped $1 billion last year.
summary_ko: D2C 브랜드 Quince가 5억 달러 투자를 유치하며 기업가치 100억 달러를 돌파했습니다. 저렴한 캐시미어 스웨터로 유명한 브랜드의 연매출이 작년 10억 달러를 넘어섰습니다. 매년 3자리수 매출 성장을 기록하고 있습니다.
summary_en: DTC brand Quince raised $500 million in funding with a valuation exceeding $10 billion. The brand, known for attractively priced cashmere sweaters, topped $1 billion in revenue last year. The company achieves triple-digit annual revenue growth.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드가 고품질 제품을 합리적 가격에 제공하는 전략으로 급속한 성장과 높은 기업가치를 달성할 수 있음을 보여줍니다.
so_what_en: Shows that D2C brands can achieve rapid growth and high valuations by offering high-quality products at reasonable prices.
key_points: Quince raises $500M with $10B+ valuation
Revenue exceeded $1 billion last year
Triple-digit annual revenue growth
Known for attractively priced cashmere products

title: Could off-price retailers start grabbing market share from each other?
description: So far, department stores and other mainstream retailers have the most to fear as TJX, Ross and Burlington open hundreds of stores each year.
summary_ko: 오프프라이스 리테일러들이 서로 시장점유율을 놓고 경쟁할 가능성에 대한 분석입니다. 현재까지는 백화점과 주류 리테일러들이 가장 큰 위협을 받고 있습니다. TJX, Ross, Burlington 등이 매년 수백 개 매장을 열고 있습니다.
summary_en: Analysis explores whether off-price retailers might start competing for market share among themselves. So far, department stores and mainstream retailers face the greatest threat. TJX, Ross, and Burlington are opening hundreds of stores annually.
so_what_ko: 오프프라이스 리테일러들의 급속한 확장으로 가격 경쟁이 심화되고 있어, D2C 브랜드들은 차별화된 가치 제안이 필요합니다.
so_what_en: Rapid expansion of off-price retailers intensifies price competition, requiring D2C brands to develop differentiated value propositions.
key_points: Off-price retailers may compete against each other for market share
Department stores and mainstream retailers currently most threatened
TJX, Ross, Burlington opening hundreds of stores annually

title: De minimis: Case aiming to revive exemption can proceed, court rules
description: The lawsuit, which challenged the Trump administration’s elimination of the trade tool, was paused until the Supreme Court ruled on the president’s tariff authority.
summary_ko: 드 미니미스 면세 혜택 부활을 목표로 하는 소송이 법원에서 진행 승인을 받았습니다. 이 소송은 트럼프 행정부의 무역 도구 폐지에 이의를 제기했습니다. 대통령의 관세 권한에 대한 대법원 판결까지 중단되었던 소송입니다.
summary_en: A lawsuit aiming to revive the de minimis exemption has been approved to proceed by the court. The lawsuit challenged the Trump administration's elimination of this trade tool. The case was paused until the Supreme Court ruled on presidential tariff authority.
so_what_ko: 드 미니미스 면세 혜택 변화는 해외 D2C 브랜드들의 미국 시장 진출 비용에 직접적인 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: Changes to de minimis exemption could directly impact costs for overseas D2C brands entering the US market.
key_points: De minimis exemption revival lawsuit proceeds in court
Challenged Trump administration's elimination of trade tool
Case was paused pending Supreme Court ruling on tariff authority

title: Ride-hailing inDrive acquires Pakistan’s Krave Mart to bolster grocery delivery
description: inDrive has closed its acquisition of KraveMart, expanding grocery delivery in a market dominated by Foodpanda.
summary_ko: 라이드헤일링 서비스 inDrive가 파키스탄의 식료품 배송업체 KraveMart를 인수했다. 이번 인수를 통해 Foodpanda가 주도하는 시장에서 식료품 배송 서비스를 확대한다. 모빌리티 서비스에서 식료품 배송으로의 사업 영역 확장이 주목된다.
summary_en: Ride-hailing service inDrive has acquired Pakistan's grocery delivery company KraveMart. The acquisition aims to expand grocery delivery services in a market dominated by Foodpanda. This represents a strategic expansion from mobility services into the grocery delivery sector.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 다양한 배송 플랫폼 옵션을 확보하여 시장 접근성을 높여야 한다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should secure diverse delivery platform options to enhance market accessibility.
key_points: inDrive acquired KraveMart to enter grocery delivery market
Expansion strategy from ride-hailing to food delivery services
Market dominated by Foodpanda faces new competition

title: Quince hits $10B valuation with giant $500M round led by Iconiq
description: E-commerce company Quince has raised another massive round, less than a year after its previous raise.
summary_ko: 이커머스 기업 Quince가 Iconiq가 주도한 5억 달러 규모의 시리즈 E 라운드를 통해 100억 달러 기업가치를 달성했다. 이는 이전 펀딩 라운드로부터 1년도 채 되지 않은 시점의 대규모 투자다. 빠른 성장세를 보이는 이커머스 분야의 투자 열기를 보여준다.
summary_en: E-commerce company Quince achieved a $10B valuation through a massive $500M Series E round led by Iconiq. This funding comes less than a year after their previous raise. The deal demonstrates continued strong investor interest in fast-growing e-commerce companies.
so_what_ko: 급성장하는 D2C 기업들은 연속적인 대규모 펀딩을 통해 시장 지배력을 확대할 수 있는 기회를 적극 활용해야 한다.
so_what_en: Fast-growing D2C companies should leverage opportunities for consecutive large funding rounds to expand market dominance.
key_points: Quince raised $500M at $10B valuation in Series E
Second major funding round within a year
Iconiq Capital led the investment round

title: Meta’s Moltbook deal points to a future built around AI agents
description: Meta’s Moltbook acquisition may look odd at first, but the deal could signal how Meta sees AI agents shaping future advertising and commerce on an agentic web.
summary_ko: Meta의 Moltbook 인수는 AI 에이전트가 중심이 되는 미래를 시사한다. 이 거래는 Meta가 AI 에이전트가 광고와 커머스를 어떻게 변화시킬지에 대한 비전을 보여준다. 에이전트 기반 웹에서의 새로운 상거래 형태를 예고하고 있다.
summary_en: Meta's Moltbook acquisition signals a future centered around AI agents. The deal reveals Meta's vision of how AI agents will shape advertising and commerce. It points to new forms of commerce in an agentic web environment.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 AI 에이전트를 활용한 개인화된 쇼핑 경험과 자동화된 고객 서비스 준비에 투자해야 한다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should invest in AI agent-powered personalized shopping experiences and automated customer service capabilities.
key_points: Meta acquired Moltbook focusing on AI agent technology
Strategic move toward agentic web commerce
AI agents expected to transform advertising and shopping

title: Amazon expands a program that lets customers shop from other retailers’ sites
description: The changes allow more merchants to participate in Amazon's Shop Direct program, which sends Amazon customers to other retailers' websites.
summary_ko: Amazon이 고객들이 다른 리테일러 사이트에서 직접 쇼핑할 수 있는 Shop Direct 프로그램을 확대했다. 더 많은 판매자들이 이 프로그램에 참여할 수 있도록 변경사항을 적용했다. Amazon 고객을 다른 리테일러 웹사이트로 연결하는 새로운 형태의 플랫폼 전략이다.
summary_en: Amazon has expanded its Shop Direct program that allows customers to shop from other retailers' websites. The changes enable more merchants to participate in the program. This represents a new platform strategy that directs Amazon customers to other retailers' sites.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 Amazon의 Shop Direct와 같은 새로운 플랫폼 기회를 활용하여 고객 접점을 다양화해야 한다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should leverage new platform opportunities like Amazon's Shop Direct to diversify customer touchpoints.
key_points: Amazon expanded Shop Direct program for external retailers
More merchants can now participate in the program
Strategy redirects Amazon traffic to other websites

title: Sally Beauty, Circana agree on multiyear supply chain solution deal
description:
Texas-based retail operator Sally Beauty Holdings (SBH) has agreed to a multiyear deal with technology provider Circana on a supply chain solution. In a March 10 announcement, Circana said the strategic partnership focuses on an “advanced technology platform” to improve business-planning capabilities. Circana said the collaboration includes a “comprehensive” supply chain insights platform that provides […]
The post Sally Beauty, Circana agree on multiyear supply chain solution deal appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: 미용용품 리테일러 Sally Beauty가 기술 제공업체 Circana와 다년간의 공급망 솔루션 계약을 체결했다. 이 전략적 파트너십은 고급 기술 플랫폼을 통한 비즈니스 계획 능력 향상에 초점을 맞춘다. 포괄적인 공급망 인사이트 플랫폼을 포함하는 협업이다.
summary_en: Beauty retailer Sally Beauty has agreed to a multiyear supply chain solution deal with technology provider Circana. The strategic partnership focuses on an advanced technology platform to improve business planning capabilities. The collaboration includes a comprehensive supply chain insights platform.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 고급 공급망 기술 플랫폼 도입을 통해 비즈니스 계획 능력과 운영 효율성을 크게 개선할 수 있다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can significantly improve business planning capabilities and operational efficiency through advanced supply chain technology platforms.
key_points: Sally Beauty partnered with Circana for supply chain solutions
Multiyear deal focuses on advanced technology platform
Comprehensive supply chain insights included in collaboration

title: Amazon opens up new AI-enabled Buy for Me, Shop Direct options for merchants
description:
As Amazon’s agentic commerce strategy continues to evolve, the online retail giant is building out its Buy for Me and Shop Direct tools as well, now with new options for third-party feeds that connect merchants with those buyer experiences. Amazon’s Shop Direct debuted in 2025 as a means for Amazon to display products that were […]
The post Amazon opens up new AI-enabled Buy for Me, Shop Direct options for merchants appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: 아마존이 AI 기반 'Buy for Me'와 'Shop Direct' 도구를 확장하여 제3자 피드 옵션을 새롭게 제공한다고 발표했습니다. 이는 판매자들이 구매 경험과 연결될 수 있도록 돕는 에이전틱 커머스 전략의 일환입니다. 2025년 출시된 Shop Direct는 아마존이 상품을 표시하는 수단으로 활용되고 있습니다.
summary_en: Amazon announced new third-party feed options for its AI-enabled 'Buy for Me' and 'Shop Direct' tools to connect merchants with buyer experiences. This expansion is part of Amazon's evolving agentic commerce strategy that helps merchants reach customers. Shop Direct, which debuted in 2025, serves as a means for Amazon to display products to consumers.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 아마존의 AI 기반 쇼핑 도구를 활용해 개인화된 구매 경험을 제공하고 고객 접점을 확대할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage Amazon's AI-powered shopping tools to deliver personalized buying experiences and expand customer touchpoints.
key_points: Amazon expands AI-enabled Buy for Me and Shop Direct with third-party feed options
Part of Amazon's broader agentic commerce strategy evolution
Shop Direct launched in 2025 as product display platform
New tools help merchants connect with Amazon's buyer experiences

title: Mastercard introduces AI ‘virtual c-suite’ to help small businesses
description:
Mastercard is expanding its push into artificial intelligence with a new suite of AI agents it designed to help small businesses manage financial and operational decisions, with a virtual C-suite that begins with a chief financial officer. The Purchase, New York-based payments company said March 10 that it will launch Virtual C-Suite. The Virtual C-Suite […]
The post Mastercard introduces AI ‘virtual c-suite’ to help small businesses appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: 마스터카드가 소상공인을 위한 AI 가상 C-Suite 서비스를 출시한다고 발표했습니다. 가상 최고재무책임자(CFO)부터 시작하는 이 AI 에이전트 모음은 재무 및 운영 의사결정을 지원합니다. 뉴욕 퍼체스에 본사를 둔 결제 회사의 AI 확장 전략의 일환입니다.
summary_en: Mastercard announced the launch of Virtual C-Suite, an AI agent suite designed to help small businesses with financial and operational decisions. The service begins with a virtual chief financial officer and expands Mastercard's push into artificial intelligence. The Purchase, New York-based payments company unveiled this initiative on March 10.
so_what_ko: 소규모 D2C 기업들은 AI 기반 가상 경영진 서비스를 통해 전문적인 재무 관리와 운영 최적화를 보다 접근 가능한 비용으로 활용할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: Small D2C companies can access professional-level financial management and operational optimization through AI-powered virtual executive services at more affordable costs.
key_points: Mastercard launches Virtual C-Suite AI agents for small businesses
Service starts with virtual chief financial officer functionality
Designed to help with financial and operational decision-making
Part of Mastercard's broader AI expansion strategy

title: Disconnected systems slow digital commerce deals for many companies
description:
Fragmented systems across pricing, quoting and contracting are slowing digital commerce transactions and costing companies revenue, according to new research released by Conga. It released findings from a study based on a survey of more than 1,200 commerce and contracting decision-makers. In the study, Conga found that 93% of organizations said deals frequently stall as […]
The post Disconnected systems slow digital commerce deals for many companies appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: Conga의 새로운 연구에 따르면 가격책정, 견적, 계약 시스템 간 단절로 인해 디지털 커머스 거래가 지연되고 있습니다. 1,200명 이상의 커머스 및 계약 의사결정자를 대상으로 한 조사에서 93%의 조직이 거래 지연을 경험한다고 응답했습니다. 분리된 시스템들이 기업의 매출 손실을 야기하고 있는 것으로 나타났습니다.
summary_en: New research by Conga reveals that fragmented systems across pricing, quoting, and contracting are slowing digital commerce transactions and costing companies revenue. A survey of over 1,200 commerce and contracting decision-makers found that 93% of organizations experience frequent deal stalls. The disconnected systems are creating significant operational challenges for businesses.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 가격책정부터 계약까지의 통합된 시스템 구축을 통해 거래 속도를 개선하고 매출 기회 손실을 방지해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies need to build integrated systems from pricing to contracting to improve transaction speed and prevent revenue opportunity losses.
key_points: 93% of organizations experience deal stalls due to system fragmentation
Disconnected pricing, quoting, and contracting systems slow transactions
Research based on survey of 1,200+ commerce decision-makers
Fragmented systems are costing companies significant revenue

title: AGCO names a chief digital and information officer
description:
Agricultural equipment manufacturer AGCO Corp. has named Jena Holtberg-Benge its new chief digital and information officer (CDIO). The appointment takes effect March 16. It expands her responsibilities from leading the company’s after-sales parts business to overseeing its global digital and technology strategy. About the new CDIO at AGCO Holtberg-Benge joined AGCO in 2023 and most […]
The post AGCO names a chief digital and information officer appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
summary_ko: 농업장비 제조업체 AGCO가 Jena Holtberg-Benge를 새로운 최고디지털정보책임자(CDIO)로 임명했다고 발표했습니다. 3월 16일부터 발효되는 이 임명으로 그녀의 역할이 애프터세일즈 부품 사업 리더십에서 글로벌 디지털 및 기술 전략 총괄로 확대됩니다. 그녀는 2023년 AGCO에 합류했습니다.
summary_en: Agricultural equipment manufacturer AGCO Corp. named Jena Holtberg-Benge as its new chief digital and information officer (CDIO), effective March 16. Her responsibilities expand from leading the company's after-sales parts business to overseeing global digital and technology strategy. Holtberg-Benge joined AGCO in 2023 and brings experience from the after-sales division.
so_what_ko: 전통적인 제조업체들이 디지털 전환을 위해 CDIO 역할을 신설하는 추세는 D2C 브랜드들도 디지털 전략의 통합적 리더십 구조를 고려해야 함을 시사합니다.
so_what_en: The trend of traditional manufacturers creating CDIO roles for digital transformation suggests D2C brands should also consider integrated leadership structures for digital strategy.
key_points: AGCO names Jena Holtberg-Benge as chief digital and information officer
Role expands from after-sales parts leadership to global digital strategy
Appointment effective March 16, 2026
Reflects manufacturing industry's focus on digital transformation

title: The simple genius behind this long-forgotten Google Chrome ad
description: We trust simple promises more than long lists. When brands focus on one clear benefit, it feels more believable than trying to do everything at once. Take it from Google.
summary_ko: HubSpot 마케팅 블로그에서 오래전 구글 크롬 광고의 단순한 천재성에 대해 분석했습니다. 브랜드가 모든 것을 한 번에 하려고 시도하는 것보다 하나의 명확한 혜택에 집중할 때 더 믿을 만하다고 느껴진다고 설명합니다. 간단한 약속을 긴 목록보다 더 신뢰한다는 원리를 구글 사례로 보여줍니다.
summary_en: HubSpot Marketing Blog analyzed the simple genius behind a long-forgotten Google Chrome ad, explaining how simple promises are more trustworthy than long lists. The article demonstrates that when brands focus on one clear benefit rather than trying to do everything at once, it feels more believable to consumers. Google's approach serves as an example of this principle.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 다양한 기능을 나열하기보다 하나의 핵심 가치 제안에 집중하여 고객의 신뢰와 이해도를 높일 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can increase customer trust and comprehension by focusing on one core value proposition rather than listing multiple features.
key_points: Simple promises are more trustworthy than comprehensive feature lists
Focused messaging on one clear benefit increases believability
Google Chrome ad serves as example of effective simple messaging
Brands should avoid trying to communicate everything at once

title: Hustlers are cashing in on China’s OpenClaw AI craze
description: Feng Qingyang had always hoped to launch his own company, but he never thought this would be how—or that the day would come this fast.  Feng, a 27-year-old software engineer based in Beijing, started tinkering with OpenClaw, a popular new open-source AI tool that can take over a device and autonomously complete tasks for a…
summary_ko: 중국의 오픈소스 AI 도구 OpenClaw가 인기를 끌면서 많은 창업자들이 이를 활용한 비즈니스 기회를 찾고 있다. 27세 소프트웨어 엔지니어 펑칭양을 포함한 많은 이들이 이 도구를 이용해 사업을 시작하고 있다. OpenClaw는 기기를 제어하고 자율적으로 작업을 완료할 수 있는 AI 도구로 주목받고 있다.
summary_en: China's open-source AI tool OpenClaw is gaining popularity as entrepreneurs rush to capitalize on its capabilities. Many individuals, including 27-year-old software engineer Feng Qingyang, are launching businesses using this tool. OpenClaw can autonomously take control of devices and complete tasks, creating new business opportunities.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 OpenClaw와 같은 자동화 AI 도구를 활용해 고객 서비스, 주문 처리, 마케팅 캠페인 등을 자동화할 수 있다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage automation tools like OpenClaw to streamline customer service, order processing, and marketing campaigns.
key_points: OpenClaw is an open-source AI tool enabling autonomous task completion
Chinese entrepreneurs are creating businesses around this technology
The tool can take control of devices and perform tasks automatically

title: One of Grammarly’s ‘experts’ is suing the company over its identity-stealing AI feature
description:
Journalist Julia Angwin is one of the writers whose likeness was used in Grammarly’s “expert review” feature. | Photo: Eóin Noonan / Sportsfile via Getty Images	

For months, Grammarly has been using the identities of real people (including us) for its "Expert Review" AI suggestions without getting their permission, and now it's facing a lawsuit from one of the journalists included, as previously reported by Wired. The class-action complaint filed by journalist Julia Angwin on Wednesday alleges that Superhuman violated the "experts'" privacy and publicity rights by breaking laws against using someone's identity for commercial purposes without their consent.
Angwin says she found out her identity was used by way of Casey Newton, who is also one of the experts that The Verge uncovered being used by Gra …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: 저널리스트 줄리아 앵윈이 Grammarly의 'Expert Review' AI 기능에서 무단으로 자신의 신원을 사용했다며 집단소송을 제기했다. Grammarly는 실제 인물들의 허가 없이 그들의 정체성을 AI 제안 기능에 사용해왔다. 이는 상업적 목적으로 타인의 정체성을 무단 사용하는 것을 금지하는 법률 위반으로 제기되었다.
summary_en: Journalist Julia Angwin filed a class-action lawsuit against Grammarly for using her identity without permission in its 'Expert Review' AI feature. Grammarly has been using real people's identities for AI suggestions without obtaining their consent. The lawsuit alleges violations of privacy and publicity rights under laws prohibiting unauthorized commercial use of someone's identity.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 AI 기능 개발 시 실제 인물의 정체성이나 콘텐츠를 사용할 때 반드시 사전 동의를 받아야 하며, 법적 리스크를 방지해야 한다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must obtain explicit consent before using real people's identities or content in AI features to avoid legal risks and maintain consumer trust.
key_points: Grammarly used real people's identities without permission in AI features
Class-action lawsuit filed for privacy and publicity rights violations
Highlights legal risks of unauthorized identity use in AI applications

title: Grammarly says it will stop using AI to clone experts without permission
description:
Superhuman says it has disabled Grammarly's "expert review" AI feature that said its edit suggestions were "inspired by" real writers, including our editor-in-chief and other Verge staff members.
"After careful consideration, we have decided to disable Expert Review as we reimagine the feature to make it more useful for users, while giving experts real control over how they want to be represented - or not represented at all," Ailian Gan, Superhuman's director of product management, said in a statement to The Verge. "Based on the feedback we've received, we clearly missed the mark. We are sorry and will do things differently going forward." 
 …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: Grammarly가 실제 전문가들의 허가 없이 AI로 복제하는 'Expert Review' 기능을 중단하겠다고 발표했다. 회사는 사용자들의 피드백을 받아들여 전문가들이 자신의 표현 방식을 실제로 제어할 수 있도록 기능을 재설계하겠다고 밝혔다. Superhuman의 제품 관리 디렉터는 실수를 인정하고 앞으로는 다르게 접근하겠다고 사과했다.
summary_en: Grammarly announced it will disable its 'Expert Review' AI feature that cloned experts without permission. The company acknowledged user feedback and plans to redesign the feature to give experts real control over their representation. Superhuman's director of product management apologized and promised a different approach going forward.
so_what_ko: AI 기능 출시 전 충분한 검토와 이해관계자 동의 확보가 필수적이며, 문제 발생 시 신속한 대응과 투명한 소통이 브랜드 신뢰도 유지에 중요하다.
so_what_en: Proper review and stakeholder consent before AI feature launches is crucial, and quick response with transparent communication helps maintain brand trust when issues arise.
key_points: Grammarly disabled controversial Expert Review AI feature
Company acknowledged missing the mark based on user feedback
Plans to redesign feature with proper expert consent and control

title: OpenAI’s Sora video generator is reportedly coming to ChatGPT
description:
OpenAI's Sora video generator could soon become a built-in feature in ChatGPT, as reported by The Information. Sora is currently only available on its website or as a standalone app, which has fallen shy of the popularity of ChatGPT. This update would allow users to access Sora's video generation capabilities directly within ChatGPT itself, much like the addition of image generation capabilities in the chatbot last year. 
Sora could help attract more users to ChatGPT, but it may also worsen the flood of deepfakes coming from OpenAI's video generator. When the Sora app initially launched less than a year ago, users generated realistic-lookin …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: OpenAI의 Sora 비디오 생성기가 ChatGPT에 내장 기능으로 통합될 예정이라고 보도되었다. 현재 독립 웹사이트나 앱으로만 이용 가능한 Sora가 ChatGPT 내에서 직접 사용할 수 있게 된다. 이는 작년 이미지 생성 기능 추가와 유사한 방식으로, 더 많은 사용자를 ChatGPT로 유치할 것으로 예상된다.
summary_en: OpenAI's Sora video generator is reportedly being integrated as a built-in feature in ChatGPT. Currently available only on its website or as a standalone app, Sora will become directly accessible within ChatGPT. This integration, similar to last year's image generation addition, is expected to attract more users to ChatGPT.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 ChatGPT 내 통합된 비디오 생성 기능을 활용해 제품 데모, 마케팅 콘텐츠, 소셜미디어 자료를 더 쉽고 빠르게 제작할 수 있을 것이다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can leverage integrated video generation in ChatGPT to create product demos, marketing content, and social media materials more easily and quickly.
key_points: Sora video generator integrating into ChatGPT as built-in feature
Expected to increase ChatGPT user adoption
May raise concerns about deepfake proliferation

title: Canva’s new editing tool adds layers to AI-generated designs
description:
Canva introduced a new feature that separates flat image files and AI-generated visuals into layered, fully editable designs. The Magic Layers tool is launching in public beta today in the US, UK, Canada, and Australia, allowing design components like objects, text boxes, and other graphics to be selected individually while preserving the original layout.
"After a breakthrough from our AI research team, we're introducing Magic Layers so anyone can take a flat image and turn it into a fully editable design inside Canva," Canva's chief product officer, Cameron Adams, said in the press release. "There's no need to start over, or to figure out  …
Read the full story at The Verge.
summary_ko: Canva가 평면 이미지 파일과 AI 생성 비주얼을 레이어별로 분리해 완전히 편집 가능한 디자인으로 변환하는 Magic Layers 도구를 출시했다. 이 기능은 미국, 영국, 캐나다, 호주에서 공개 베타로 시작되며, 원본 레이아웃을 유지하면서 개별 구성요소를 선택 편집할 수 있다. Canva의 최고 제품 책임자는 이를 AI 연구팀의 혁신적 성과라고 소개했다.
summary_en: Canva launched Magic Layers, a tool that separates flat images and AI-generated visuals into layered, fully editable designs. The feature is launching in public beta in the US, UK, Canada, and Australia, allowing individual component editing while preserving original layouts. Canva's chief product officer described it as a breakthrough from their AI research team.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 Magic Layers를 활용해 기존 마케팅 자료를 쉽게 재편집하고 브랜드에 맞게 커스터마이징할 수 있어 디자인 작업 효율성을 크게 향상시킬 수 있다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can use Magic Layers to easily re-edit existing marketing materials and customize them to brand requirements, significantly improving design workflow efficiency.
key_points: Magic Layers converts flat images into editable layered designs
Launching in public beta across four English-speaking markets
Allows individual component editing while preserving layout
